applied-python-projects.title: Applied Python Projects: Object-Oriented Apps
applied-python-projects.description: Build graded multi-file Python projects with the four OOP pillars: encapsulation, abstraction, inheritance, and polymorphism.
applied-python-projects.moreComingSoon: More applied Python project lessons are coming soon.

python-8-object-oriented-foundations.title: Object-Oriented Foundations
python-8-object-oriented-foundations.description: Learn classes, instances, constructors, methods, encapsulation, imports, helper files, and lists of objects.
outcomes: Define model classes in separate files
Use helper and service files in small projects
why: Strong OOP starts by putting behavior near the data it controls.
The course now makes multi-file work normal before projects begin.

python-9-inheritance-polymorphism-and-ab.title: Inheritance, Polymorphism, and Abstraction
python-9-inheritance-polymorphism-and-ab.description: Learn inheritance, overriding, polymorphic collections, and base-interface thinking through a catalog project.
outcomes: Create subclasses that reuse shared behavior
Process mixed objects through shared interfaces
why: The four OOP pillars need to be taught as a sequence, not scattered examples.
This module adds the missing inheritance, polymorphism, and abstraction foundation.

python-10-testing-debugging-oop-projects.title: Testing and Debugging OOP Projects
python-10-testing-debugging-oop-projects.description: Test object state, subclass behavior, polymorphic services, imports, and refactors in multi-file projects.
outcomes: Write tests for object state and method behavior
Debug multi-file import and state problems
Refactor services without breaking OOP behavior
why: Testing makes the OOP design reliable as files and classes grow.
Debugging is taught inside realistic multi-file apps, not isolated snippets.

python-11-oop-capstone-project.title: Final OOP Capstone Project
python-11-oop-capstone-project.description: Build and test a complete Smart Task Tracker using encapsulation, abstraction, inheritance, and polymorphism.
outcomes: Design a complete multi-file OOP app
Use all four OOP pillars in one final project
Ship tests, data, reports, and README together
why: The final capstone proves the learner can build a complete graded project.
Every capstone step now starts from the previous full solution.

applied-python-projects-python-8-object-.title: Object Foundations
applied-python-projects-python-8-object-.description: Classes in files, instance state, constructors, and object methods.

applied-python-projects-python-8-encapsu.title: Encapsulation and Services
applied-python-projects-python-8-encapsu.description: Validation, helper imports, object responsibility, and service functions.

applied-python-projects-python-9-inherit.title: Inheritance and Overrides
applied-python-projects-python-9-inherit.description: Shared base classes, subclass constructors, `super()`, and method overriding.

applied-python-projects-python-9-polymor.title: Polymorphism and Abstraction
applied-python-projects-python-9-polymor.description: Mixed object lists, shared method names, base interfaces, and services.

applied-python-projects-python-10-testin.title: Testing OOP Behavior
applied-python-projects-python-10-testin.description: Assertions for model state, validation, subclasses, and polymorphic services.

applied-python-projects-python-10-debugg.title: Debugging and Refactoring
applied-python-projects-python-10-debugg.description: Import bugs, state bugs, service refactors, and thin main files.

applied-python-projects-python-10-module.title: Module Project
applied-python-projects-python-10-module.description: Test and polish a cumulative OOP catalog.

applied-python-projects-python-11-capsto.title: Capstone Architecture
applied-python-projects-python-11-capsto.description: Plan files, create base task models, and shape the project.

applied-python-projects-python-11-capsto.title: Capstone Services and Polish
applied-python-projects-python-11-capsto.description: Storage, reports, tests, README, and final output.

applied-python-projects-python-11-final-.title: Final Capstone
applied-python-projects-python-11-final-.description: Build the final cumulative Smart Task Tracker.
